sections.title: Computer and Electronics Use Policy Acknowledgment
sections.subtitle: Employee information

sections.title: Acknowledgement
sections.html: I acknowledge that I have received, read, and understand the Computer and Electronics Use Policy of MH Construction, Inc. I understand that company computers, mobile devices, software, e-mail, and network access are provided for company business and remain the property of MH Construction, Inc. I agree to protect project stakeholder data through proper password practices and access controls, to use company e-mail for business purposes only, and to comply with all confidentiality and information-security requirements. I understand that the company reserves the right to monitor e-mail and files created on company time or for the company's benefit, and that any breach of security protocol may result in disciplinary action up to and including termination.

sections.title: Computer and Electronics Use Policy Sign-Off
